positive: A highly symmetrical and detailed mystical forest scene rendered in a striking Art Nouveau graphic style. The central composition features stylized elements like glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, winding roots, and a graceful deer silhouette. Incorporate subtle celestial elements such as crescent moons and constellations to frame the forest. Use thick, bold outlines and negative space to maximize contrast. The color palette must be rich and moody: deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and metallic gold accents. Designed specifically as a vector illustration for textile printing, clean silhouettes, highly stylized, magical, dramatic spotlighting.
negative: blurry, low detail, poor resolution, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, noisy, messy, photo-realistic, gradient, watercolor, grainy
